verse_text: Then Simon Peter, having a sword, drew it and struck the high priest's servant, and cut off his right ear. The servant's name was Malchus.

links.context: Jesus rebukes Peter (identified in [[JOH.18:10]]) for using the sword, for he still does not understand that Christ is going to His death willingly, that salvation for mankind might be fulfilled. A legion is 6,000 soldiers, so twelve legions equal 72,000 angels. That this death was foretold in the Scriptures served to strengthen the disciples at their hour of greatest test.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
